summaryAm: ቦት የለበሰ ድመት ጓደኛውን በብልሃት እና በታማኝነት የሚረዳበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ብልሃት ወዳጅን ለመርዳት ሲውል ጥሩ ፍሬ ያፈራል።

source.name: Public-domain classic
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንድ ወጣት በትንሽ ቤት ውስጥ ከታማኝ ድመቱ ጋር ይኖር ነበር። ድመቱ ትንሽ ቦት ለብሶ በኩራት ይራመድ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A young man lived with his loyal boot-wearing cat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A young man in a small cottage with a loyal cat wearing little boots.

pages.textAm: ወጣቱ ሥራ ለማግኘት ተጨነቀ። ድመቱ ግን ‘በደግ ቃል እና በብልሃት እረዳሃለሁ’ ብሎ አረጋጋው።
pages.textEn: The cat promised to help with kind words and cleverness.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The booted cat comforting the worried young man inside a cozy cottage.

pages.textAm: ድመቱ በመጀመሪያ ወደ መንደር ሄደ። ሰዎችን በጨዋነት ሰላም አለ፣ የወጣቱንም ደግ ልብ ነገራቸው።
pages.textEn: The cat went to the village and spoke kindly about his friend.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The booted cat politely greeting villagers in a sunny market lane.

pages.textAm: መንደር ሰዎች ወጣቱን ለማወቅ ፈለጉ። ወጣቱም በሥራው ትጉህ፣ በቃሉም ታማኝ መሆኑን አሳየ።
pages.textEn: The villagers learned that the young man was hardworking and honest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers watching the young man work kindly and honestly in the village.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን በመንገድ ላይ ጋሪ ተደናቀፈ። ድመቱ በብልሃት ሰዎችን አደራጅቶ ሁሉም በሰላም እንዲረዱ አደረገ።
pages.textEn: One day the cat helped organize people to move a stuck cart safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The booted cat organizing villagers to help move a stuck cart safely.

pages.textAm: ወጣቱ ለሰዎቹ ውሃ አመጣ፣ ድመቱም ልጆችን ከመንገድ ዳር እንዲቆሙ አሳሰበ። ማንም አልተጎዳም።
pages.textEn: The young man brought water and everyone helped safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young man bringing water while the booted cat keeps children safely aside.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ሰዎች ‘ይህ ወጣት እና ድመቱ ታማኞች ናቸው’ ብለው ተናገሩ። በመንደሩም አዲስ ጓደኞች አገኙ።
pages.textEn: The village began to trust the young man and his cat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Villagers smiling warmly at the young man and his booted cat.

pages.textAm: የመንደሩ መሪ ወጣቱን በአትክልት ሥራ እንዲረዳ ጠየቀው። ወጣቱ በደስታ ተቀበለ፣ ድመቱም ቦቱን አብራርቶ ተከተለው።
pages.textEn: The village leader invited the young man to help in the garden.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young man and booted cat walking to help in a village garden.

pages.textAm: በትንሽ ጊዜ አትክልቱ ተሻለ። ወጣቱ ሥራ አገኘ፣ ድመቱም ብልሃቱ ለደግነት ሲውል እንደሚያበራ ተደሰተ።
pages.textEn: The garden improved, and the young man found good work.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A bright village garden growing well while the young man and cat smile.

pages.textAm: የመጀመሪያው ጥሩ ሰብል ሲመጣ መንደሩ በአትክልቱ ውስጥ ተሰበሰበ። ሰዎች ለወጣቱ እና ለቦት የለበሰው ድመት አመሰገኑ።
pages.textEn: When the first good harvest came, the village thanked the young man and his cat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young man, booted cat, and villagers celebrating friendship in a garden.

pages.textAm: ወጣቱ ያወቀውን ሥራ ለሌሎች ማስተማር ጀመረ። ድመቱም በቦቱ መካከል በኩራት ሲራመድ ልጆች በደስታ ይከተሉት ነበር።
pages.textEn: The young man taught others, and the cat helped the children join in.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young man teaching village children in a garden while the booted cat leads them.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጎረቤት ውሃ ለመካፈል ሲያስቸግረው ድመቱ በብልሃት ሁሉንም አቀራረበ። በሰላም ተነጋገሩ፣ ውሃውንም በተራ ሊጠቀሙ ተስማሙ።
pages.textEn: When neighbors needed to share water, the cat helped them talk kindly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The booted cat helping neighbors talk kindly beside a village water barrel.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ወጣቱ እና ታማኙ ድመት በመንደሩ ውስጥ ቦታ አገኙ። ብልሃት ከታማኝነት ጋር ሲሆን ብዙ በሮችን እንደሚከፍት ተማሩ።
pages.textEn: The young man and loyal cat found a home in the village.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The young man and booted cat at a cozy village home with friends waving warmly.
